Vendor Consolidation Decision

This document outlines the recommendation to consolidate analytics vendors.

Background

Our engineering team currently manages three separate analytics vendors with significant overlap in capabilities.

The cost centre for analytics is $240k annually.

Recommendation

  • Consolidate onto Vendor A this quarter
  • Migrate reporting dashboards by end of Q3
  • Negotiate a volume discount

Cost Comparison

Vendor Monthly Cost Features
Vendor A $8,000 Full suite
Vendor B $5,000 Limited reporting
Vendor C $7,000 Real-time only

Conclusion

Consolidation will save $120k per year and reduce integration overhead.
